name: @live-support/widget
description: Embeddable React customer support widget for live-support.

scripts.build: vite build && node scripts/copy-pages-build.mjs && tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.json
scripts.pages:dev: pnpm build && wrangler pages dev public
scripts.pages:deploy: pnpm build && wrangler pages deploy public --project-name live-support-widget --branch production
